case_title: GONZALO GUORON VS. OPPORTUNITY FUND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED DEC-02-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OPPORTUNITY FUND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUORON, GONZALO AS TO DEFENDANT OPPORTUNITY FUND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

"THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF CAN REFILE THE ACTION IN SANTA CLARA COURTS. DEFENDANTS CHALLENGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED", PER PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETA
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. FILED BY GUORON, GONZALO
